sprint.goal: Fix P0 hook-breaking bugs (#972, #973), then resume Go kernel wire-up (#955). Hook path must work before Go delegation can ship.

senior.title: P0: Fix hook deny reason retry metadata (#972) + bundle essentials pack in npm (#973)
senior.note: P0 fast-track: #972 breaks all governed sessions (retry text in deny reason → Claude Code blocks all tool use). #973 compounds it (essentials pack missing → default-deny on everything). Fix both before resuming #955 Go delegation.

blockers.description: Hook deny reason includes '(attempt N/N)' — Claude Code misinterprets as blocking error, killing all tool use in governed sessions
essentials policy pack not bundled in npm — all hook invocations hit default-deny

prs.title: fix(claude-init): write hooks with full binary path (closes #964)
prs.note: Merged successfully. All CI checks passed.

coverageGaps.note: No dedicated test file. Recently modified in PR #969 (same hook path fix as claude-init). claude-init has 39 tests; copilot-init has zero.
